data.name: CalendarDesc
data.value: View your daily and weekly schedule.

data.name: CustomerDesc
data.value: Manage customer database and communication records.

data.name: JobDesc
data.value: Review ongoing projects and work order status.

data.name: PanelTitle
data.value: Imaj Post-Production Services Information System Management Panel

data.name: ServiceQuality
data.value: Pioneer in service quality and technological infrastructure.

data.name: CustomerCreateFailed
data.value: An error occurred while creating the customer.

data.name: DataLoadError
data.value: An error occurred while loading data.

data.name: CustomerUpdateFailed
data.value: An error occurred while updating the customer.

data.name: ReportDataUnavailable
data.value: Report data could not be retrieved.

data.name: ReportRequestTimedOut
data.value: The report request timed out. Please narrow the date range and try again.

data.name: StartEndDateRequired
data.value: Start and end dates are required.

data.name: EndDateBeforeStart
data.value: End date cannot be earlier than start date.

data.name: ReservationPairRequired
data.value: Reservable and reservation interval must be selected together.

data.name: ProductListUnavailable
data.value: Product list could not be retrieved.

data.name: ResoCatListUnavailable
data.value: Resource category list could not be retrieved.

data.name: AtLeastOneFunctionRequired
data.value: At least one function must be selected.

data.name: AtLeastOneLocalizedNameRequired
data.value: At least one localized name is required.

data.name: CodeMaxLength8
data.value: Code can be at most 8 characters.

data.name: EndDateMustBeAfterStartDate
data.value: End date must be after start date.

data.name: EndDateRangeInvalid
data.value: In end date range, first date cannot be later than second date.

data.name: FunctionListUnavailable
data.value: Function list could not be retrieved.

data.name: NameMaxLength32
data.value: Name can be at most 32 characters.

data.name: ProductCategorySaveFailed
data.value: Product category could not be saved.

data.name: ProductCategoryUpdateFailed
data.value: Product category could not be updated.

data.name: ProductGroupSaveFailed
data.value: Product group could not be saved.

data.name: ProductGroupUpdateFailed
data.value: Product group could not be updated.

data.name: ResourceCategorySaveFailed
data.value: Resource category could not be saved.

data.name: ResourceCategoryUpdateFailed
data.value: Resource category could not be updated.

data.name: ResourceListUnavailable
data.value: Resource list could not be retrieved.

data.name: RoleListUnavailable
data.value: Role list could not be retrieved.

data.name: SequenceRangeInvalid
data.value: Sequence start value cannot be greater than end value.

data.name: StartDateRangeInvalid
data.value: In start date range, first date cannot be later than second date.

data.name: IssueDateRangeInvalid
data.value: Both start and end must be entered for the invoice date range.

data.name: TaxRateRangeInvalid
data.value: Tax rate must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: TaxTypeSaveFailed
data.value: Tax type could not be saved.

data.name: TaxTypeUpdateFailed
data.value: Tax type could not be updated.

data.name: TimeTypeSaveFailed
data.value: Overtime type could not be saved.

data.name: TimeTypeUpdateFailed
data.value: Overtime type could not be updated.

data.name: WorkTypeSaveFailed
data.value: Task type could not be saved.

data.name: WorkTypeUpdateFailed
data.value: Task type could not be updated.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneEmployee
data.value: Please select at least one employee.

data.name: DetailedPendingInvoiceJobsReport
data.value: Print Detailed Pending Invoice Jobs Report

data.name: SummaryPendingInvoiceJobsReport
data.value: Print Summary Pending Invoice Jobs Report

data.name: AllEmployeesSelectedMessage
data.value: Assignment list is disabled because all employees are selected.

data.name: PleaseSignIn
data.value: Please sign in to your account

data.name: WorkflowConfirmText
data.value: This action will be applied. Do you want to continue?

data.name: AccessDeniedMessage
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: UserValidationFailed
data.value: User information could not be validated.

data.name: JobOutOfScope
data.value: Job record is out of scope.

data.name: JobAlreadyEvaluatedUndoOnly
data.value: Only undo evaluate is allowed for evaluated jobs.

data.name: JobCompleteRequiresOpen
data.value: The job must be open to complete it.

data.name: JobCompleteNotAllowedWhenInvoiced
data.value: You cannot complete an invoiced job.

data.name: JobUndoCompleteRequiresCompleted
data.value: The job must be completed to undo completion.

data.name: JobUndoCompleteNotAllowedWhenInvoiced
data.value: You cannot undo completion for an invoiced job.

data.name: JobPriceRequiresCompleted
data.value: The job must be completed to price it.

data.name: JobPriceNotAllowedWhenInvoiced
data.value: You cannot price an invoiced job.

data.name: JobUndoPriceRequiresPriced
data.value: The job must be priced to undo pricing.

data.name: JobUndoPriceNotAllowedWhenInvoiced
data.value: You cannot undo pricing for an invoiced job.

data.name: JobCloseRequiresCompleted
data.value: The job must be completed to close it.

data.name: JobUndoCloseRequiresClosed
data.value: The job must be closed to undo closing.

data.name: JobCancelNotAllowed
data.value: Cancel is not valid for this state.

data.name: JobCancelNotAllowedWhenInvoiced
data.value: You cannot cancel an invoiced job.

data.name: JobUndoCancelRequiresCancelled
data.value: The job must be cancelled to undo cancellation.

data.name: JobEvaluateNotAllowed
data.value: Evaluate is not valid for this job.

data.name: JobUndoEvaluateNotAllowed
data.value: Undo evaluate is not valid for this job.

data.name: JobStatusUpdateFailed
data.value: Job status could not be updated.

data.name: InvoiceOutOfScope
data.value: Invoice record is out of scope.

data.name: InvoiceAlreadyEvaluatedUndoOnly
data.value: Only undo evaluate is allowed for evaluated invoices.

data.name: InvoiceConfirmRequiresOpen
data.value: The invoice must be open to confirm it.

data.name: InvoiceUndoConfirmRequiresApproved
data.value: The invoice must be approved to undo confirmation.

data.name: InvoiceIssueRequiresApproved
data.value: The invoice must be approved to issue it.

data.name: InvoiceCancelNotAllowed
data.value: Cancel is not valid for this state.

data.name: InvoiceRejectNotAllowed
data.value: Reject is not valid for this state.

data.name: InvoiceEvaluateNotAllowed
data.value: Evaluate is not valid for this invoice.

data.name: InvoiceUndoEvaluateNotAllowed
data.value: Undo evaluate is not valid for this invoice.

data.name: InvoiceStatusUpdateFailed
data.value: Invoice status could not be updated.

data.name: AbsenceOutOfScope
data.value: Absence record is out of scope.

data.name: AbsenceAlreadyEvaluatedUndoOnly
data.value: Undo evaluate must be applied first for evaluated absences.

data.name: AbsenceConfirmRequiresOpen
data.value: The record must be open to confirm it.

data.name: AbsenceUndoConfirmRequiresApproved
data.value: The record must be approved to undo confirmation.

data.name: AbsenceUseRequiresApproved
data.value: The record must be approved to use it.

data.name: AbsenceUndoUseRequiresUsed
data.value: The record must be used to undo utilization.

data.name: AbsenceSpendRequiresApproved
data.value: The record must be approved to spend it.

data.name: AbsenceUndoSpendRequiresSpent
data.value: The record must be spent to undo spending.

data.name: AbsenceCancelNotAllowed
data.value: Cancel is not valid for this state.

data.name: AbsenceRejectNotAllowed
data.value: Reject is not valid for this state.

data.name: AbsenceEvaluateNotAllowed
data.value: Evaluate is not valid for this record.

data.name: AbsenceUndoEvaluateNotAllowed
data.value: Undo evaluate is not valid for this record.

data.name: AbsenceStatusUpdateFailed
data.value: Absence status could not be updated.

data.name: AbsenceDateChangeOnlyOpen
data.value: Date change is only allowed for open absences.

data.name: AbsenceDateChangeNotAllowedWhenEvaluated
data.value: Date change is not allowed for evaluated absences.

data.name: EndDateAfterStartRequired
data.value: End date must be greater than start date.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneProductGroup
data.value: Please select at least one product group.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneReason
data.value: Please select at least one reason.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneUser
data.value: Please select at least one user.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneTaxType
data.value: Please select at least one tax type.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneFunction
data.value: Please select at least one function.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneTimeType
data.value: Please select at least one overtime type.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneProductCategory
data.value: Please select at least one product category.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneAbsence
data.value: Please select at least one absence.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneWorkType
data.value: Please select at least one work type.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneResoCat
data.value: Please select at least one resource category.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneProduct
data.value: Please select at least one product.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOneResource
data.value: Please select at least one resource.
